description: The refrigerator from the famous German manufacturer Bosch is a classic two-chamber model with a total volume of 321 liters. Of this, 218 liters are in the refrigerator compartment, and 103 liters are in the freezer compartment located at the bottom of the device. The Multi Airflow cooling system ensures consistent humidity and temperature throughout the entire cooling zone, from door drawers to back nooks, for long-lasting food storage. And No Frost technology prevents the formation of ice and frost, thereby eliminating the need to manually defrost the refrigerator. Two separate cooling circuits allow you to independently regulate the temperature in the refrigerator and freezer compartments. At the same time, a convenient touch panel is provided for control. Bosch KGN362LDF offers everything you need to organize your products correctly. The refrigerator compartment has several height-adjustable shelves, side shelves, a large VitaFresh pull-out container with an optimal level of humidity for vegetables, fruits and herbs, a zero-temperature container for meat and fish, and a special chrome shelf for placing bottles. The Super Cool function lowers the temperature for a short period of time to quickly cool fresh food. The freezer is divided into 3 compartments and has a Super Freeze function for quickly freezing added food. The freezer is capable of freezing about 10 kg of food per day and maintaining the optimal temperature for 14 hours in the event of a power outage. Also among the advantages of the refrigerator are fairly quiet operation (noise level does not exceed 35 dB), LED lighting in the refrigerator compartment, the ability to hang the doors on the right and left sides, and a signal that notifies you of an open door or other problems.
